title: Foil holder, syringe holder, testing device and method for testing needle penetration force
abstract: The present invention relates to foil holder, syringe holder and testing device for testing needle penetration force and method for testing needle penetration force.
claims: Claims 1. Foil holder for a testing device (1) for needle penetration testing, wherein the foil holder (3) comprises a holder base (30), a clamping element (31) and clamping means for attaching the clamping element (31) to the holder base (30); and wherein the holder base (30) has a holding surface (302) and an insertion hole (300) provided in the holding surface (302), the clamping element (31) has a contact surface (312) and a penetration hole (310) provided in the contact surface (312), characterized in that the clamping means are provided at the clamping element (31) and the holder base (30) the clamping element (31) comprises a top plate (3113) and is a cap (311) and has two openings (313) for receiving a foil (6), and the foil openings (313) are provided by recesses (3130) in the top plate (3113) of the clamping element (31). 2. Foil holder according to claim 1 , wherein the clamping means are means for applying pressure onto at least a section of the foil (6) between the holding surface (302) and the contact surface (312). 3. Foil holder according to anyone of claims 1 or 2, wherein one of the holding surface (302) and the contact surface (312) has a convex shape and the other one of the holding surface (302) and the contact surface (312) has a concave shape. 4. Foil holder according to anyone of claims 1 to 3, wherein the clamping means are screw-type means, wherein an outer thread (3010) is provided at the holder base (30) and an inner thread (3110) is provided at the clamping element (31). 5. Foil holder according to anyone of claims 1 to 3, wherein the clamping means comprise at least one magnet or are snapping means. 6. Foil holder according to anyone of claims 1 to 5, wherein the penetration hole (310) is provided in the top plate (3113). 7. Foil holder according to claim 6, wherein the clamping means further comprises an annular wall (3111) extending from one side of the top plate (3113) for defining a receiving space (3112) for receiving an attachment area (301) of the holder base (30). 8. Foil holder according to anyone of claims 1 to 7, wherein the foil openings (313) are provided at the outer circumference of the top plate (3113) at diametrically opposite sides of the clamping element (31). 9. Foil holder according to anyone of claims 1 to 8, wherein the cap (311 ) has at least one notch at at least part of the outer circumference. 10. Foil holder according to anyone of claims 1 to 9, wherein the width of the recesses (3130) is preferably larger than the diameter of the penetration hole (310) and/or insertion hole (300). 11. Syringe holder for a testing device (1) for needle penetration testing with a foil holder (3) according to anyone of claims 1 to 10, characterized in that the syringe holder (4) is a holder for holding the barrel (50) of the syringe (5) and the syringe holder (4) has a body (40) and a cylindrical protrusion (41) for insertion into the barrel (50) of a syringe (5) and at least one O-ring (42) is provided on the cylindrical protrusion (41). 12. Testing device for needle penetration testing, characterized in that the testing device (1) comprises at least one foil holder (3) according to anyone of claims 1 to 10. 13. Testing device according to claim 12, wherein the testing device (1) further comprises at least one syringe holder (4) according to claim 11. 14. Method for testing needle penetration characterized in that the testing device (1) is a testing device (1) according to anyone of claims 12 or 13, wherein the method comprises the steps of: clamping a foil (6) in the foil holder (3); attaching a barrel (50) of a syringe (5) to the syringe holder (4); and penetrating the foil (6) by the needle cannula (55) of the syringe (5) while measuring the force.
